issues.title: Truncated Constants Reference
issues.why: File 15-constants-reference.md is truncated mid-sentence due to the 136KB context cap, leaving the 'Contributors' section and potentially some final rules incomplete.
issues.fix: Move the Contributors section to a shared file or ensure critical normative rules are placed at the top of the file.

issues.title: Ambiguous 'isBusyOrLocked' Implementation
issues.why: AC-22 and 10-database.md refer to an 'isBusyOrLocked' predicate but the exact error-code mapping for 'modernc.org/sqlite' (the recommended CGo-free driver) vs 'mattn/go-sqlite3' is not explicitly enumerated.
issues.fix: Add a code snippet in 10-database.md explicitly mapping SQLITE_BUSY (5) and SQLITE_LOCKED (6) for the recommended driver.

issues.title: Unresolved Mermaid Diagram References
issues.why: 00-overview.md and 06-output-formatting.md reference .mmd and .mmd files (e.g., lifecycle-cli-invocation.mmd) that are mentioned but the raw content for some is not provided in the text blocks.
issues.fix: Ensure all referenced Mermaid source code is inlined within the markdown files.
